1894140.name: Seed of Nostalgia
1894140.description:
Features:

  • 25 - 30 hours of pure classic adventure, + more with optional / endgame content.

  • Beautiful Pixel Art and environmental animations bring the world of Sylvara to life.

  • A story that blends lighthearted adventure, with deeper symbolic and philosophical themes.

  • Explore a vast world filled with wondrous locations and hidden secrets.

  • Stylish Retro turn-based battles that happen in the world you explore, no random encounters!

  • Mine metals, gather materials from enemies, and craft or upgrade new weapons for even more power!

  • Get to know the characters of the world through emotional moments and environmental storytelling.

  • A diverse party of 8 playable characters to enlist and harness their unique class abilities, and build the way you want, with fully customizable Skill Trees.

  • A beautiful and nostalgia-filled soundtrack that will bring you back to the 90's golden era.

  • Full modern controller support.

In the enchanting world of Seed of Nostalgia, ancient myths and modern magic intertwine. For centuries, the secluded village of Arboreum, nestled atop the colossal World Tree Verdan'Thala, has safeguarded the mystical Lumenite, the primordial source of life and balance.

Atilla, a young and aspiring initiate in the Order of Lumen, is about to complete his training and fulfill his duty to protect the sacred tree. However, a mysterious event disrupts his ancient Ascendance rite, and sends his village into a state of despair.

As Verdan'Thala begins to wither, Atilla must descend from the World Tree for the first time and journey across a land filled with wonders and dangers. Alongside a cast of unique and compelling characters—including Aleister, the enigmatic Obsidian Mage; Roland, the eccentric Alchemist; Tyra, the compassionate Prismatic Mage; and Hawk, the cunning Marksman—Atilla seeks to uncover the truth behind the disruption and restore the life-giving power of the Lumenite.

Yet, shadows loom over their quest. Lord Heinrik Vandran, the enigmatic leader of a distant corrupt kingdom, seeks to unravel the world’s balance, driven by a hidden agenda tied to an ancient and malevolent religion. As Atilla and his companions unravel the secrets of the Seed of Life and the ancient temples that sustain it, they uncover a deeper conspiracy that challenges their beliefs and forces them to confront the very nature of sacrifice, duty, and destiny.

Seed of Nostalgia offers a rich, retro-inspired JRPG experience with stunning pixel art, engaging turn-based combat, and a heartfelt narrative. Explore lush forests, mystic deserts, and frozen mountains as you guide Atilla and his allies through a tale of hope, friendship, and the enduring power of life itself. Will you unravel the cosmic secrets that hold the keys to the world's redemption?
1894140.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
